sections.entity:
<Entity id="ab4ca41e-d5ef-4ee0-9851-06be367cb032" patternsProximity="300" recommendedConfidence="85" relaxProximity="false">
<Pattern confidenceLevel="85">
<IdMatch idRef="Pattern_bail_condition_document_bail_condition_terms_bail-condition-document" />
<Match idRef="Evidence_bail_condition_document_primary_keywords_bail-condition-document" />
<Match idRef="Evidence_bail_condition_document_classification_markers_bail-condition-document" />
<Match idRef="Evidence_bail_condition_document_corroborative_terms_bail-condition-document" />
<Match idRef="Pattern_bail_condition_document_bail_act_reference_bail-condition-document" />
<Match idRef="Pattern_bail_condition_document_bail_section_reference_bail-condition-document" />
<Any minMatches="0" maxMatches="0">
<Match idRef="Filter_bail_condition_document_exclusion_bail-condition-document" />
</Any>
</Pattern>
<Pattern confidenceLevel="75">
<IdMatch idRef="Pattern_bail_condition_document_bail_condition_terms_bail-condition-document" />
<Match idRef="Evidence_bail_condition_document_primary_keywords_bail-condition-document" />
<Any minMatches="0" maxMatches="0">
<Match idRef="Filter_bail_condition_document_exclusion_bail-condition-document" />
</Any>
</Pattern>
<Pattern confidenceLevel="65">
<IdMatch idRef="Pattern_bail_condition_document_bail_condition_terms_bail-condition-document" />
<Any minMatches="0" maxMatches="0">
<Match idRef="Filter_bail_condition_document_exclusion_bail-condition-document" />
</Any>
</Pattern>
</Entity>

resources:
<Resource idRef="ab4ca41e-d5ef-4ee0-9851-06be367cb032">
<Name default="true" langcode="en-us">TestPattern - Bail Condition Document</Name>
<Description default="true" langcode="en-us">Detects bail condition documents including bail undertakings, surety arrangements, and conditions imposed on accused persons under the Bail Act 1980 (Qld). These documents contain personal details of accused persons, reporting obligations, curfew details, exclusion zones, and no-contact conditions.</Description>
</Resource>
